name: PicPay Brazilian Digital Wallet and Payment API
what_it_does: PicPay Brazilian digital wallet and payment REST API for Brazilian merchants and e-commerce platforms to accept PicPay wallet payments, PIX instant payments, and credit card payments — enabling Brazilian checkout integration, PIX QR code generation, payment link creation, and merchant settlement through PicPay's 65M+ user super app payment platform. Enables AI agents to manage PicPay wallet payment for Brazilian super app checkout automation, handle PIX payment for instant transfer automation, access payment link for URL checkout automation, retrieve QR code for static/dynamic PIX automation, manage transaction status for payment verification automation, handle refund for payment reversal automation, access webhook for payment event notification automation, retrieve settlement for merchant disbursement automation, manage subscription for recurring payment automation, and integrate PicPay with Brazilian e-commerce, marketplace, and loyalty platforms for end-to-end Brazilian payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting PicPay wallet payments from Brazilian consumers for e-commerce checkout automation agents
Generating PIX QR codes and payment links for Brazilian instant payment automation agents
Processing merchant settlements from PicPay transactions for Brazilian financial reconciliation automation agents
Integrating PicPay payment options with Brazilian marketplace platforms for multi-payment automation agents
not_for: Non-Brazilian markets (PicPay is a Brazilian payment platform serving Brazilian consumers)
B2B enterprise procurement payments (PicPay is consumer super app payments)
International cross-border payments (PicPay is domestic Brazilian payment focused)
best_when: A Brazilian merchant, e-commerce platform, or super app wanting AI agents to accept PicPay wallet payments, generate PIX QR codes, create payment links, and process merchant settlements through PicPay's 65M+ user Brazilian payment platform.
avoid_when: PIX BACEN COMPLIANCE: PIX is regulated by Banco Central do Brasil (BACEN); automated non-compliant PIX implementation creates BACEN regulatory violation; automated must implement BACEN-compliant PIX EMV QR code standards for PIX payments. WEBHOOK SIGNATURE REQUIRED: PicPay webhook events require signature verification; automated unverified webhook processing creates spoofed payment confirmation risk; automated must verify PicPay webhook signature before processing payment events. CONSUMER APP AUTHENTICATION FOR WALLET: PicPay wallet payments require consumer to approve in PicPay app; automated server-side wallet charge without consumer action creates payment failure; automated must redirect consumer to PicPay app for wallet payment authorization. PIX IS FREE BUT REGULATED: PIX is a no-fee instant payment system but requires proper BACEN registration and compliance; automated PicPay-only PIX implementation without BACEN infrastructure creates dependency on PicPay as PIX intermediary; automated large volumes should consider direct BACEN PIX participant status.

auth.notes: PicPay uses API key (x-picpay-token header) for merchant authentication. REST API with JSON. São Paulo, Brazil HQ. Founded 2012 by Ricardo Dutra. Products: Digital wallet, PIX, payment links, QR code, credit card, debit card, installments, loyalty (PicPay Points). SDKs: None public (GitHub examples). BACEN regulated, PIX participant. 65M+ users. Owned by J&F Investimentos and Ricardo Dutra. Competes with Mercado Pago and PagSeguro for Brazilian digital payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for registered merchants; production requires merchant onboarding
pricing.paid_tiers: PIX: free; wallet/credit card: MDR (merchant discount rate) per transaction; installment: financial charges
pricing.notes: São Paulo BR. BACEN. PIX free. MDR for card/wallet. 65M+ users. J&F + founders.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; payment creation APIs throttled; webhooks for payment events

known_agent_gotchas: WEBHOOK SIGNATURE VERIFICATION REQUIRED: PicPay webhook events must be signature-verified; automated unverified webhook processing creates spoofed payment vulnerability; automated must verify PicPay webhook signature before processing payment status updates

PIX DYNAMIC QR HAS EXPIRY: PicPay PIX dynamic QR codes have configurable expiry; automated permanent QR code assumption creates expired_pix_key for stale QR codes; automated must set appropriate expiry and regenerate QR codes for new payment requests

WALLET PAYMENT REQUIRES CONSUMER APP: PicPay wallet payments require consumer confirmation in PicPay app; automated server-side wallet deduction creates payment_pending_consumer_action state; automated must implement redirect or deeplink to PicPay app

BACEN PIX COMPLIANCE: PIX payments must comply with BACEN EMV QR code standard; automated non-standard QR implementation creates PIX processing failure; automated must use BACEN-compliant PIX EMV QR code format for all PIX payment requests

LGPD DATA COMPLIANCE: PicPay consumer data is subject to Brazil's LGPD (Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados); automated unrestricted data use creates LGPD violation; automated must implement consent management and data subject rights per LGPD
agent_readiness.security_notes: Brazilian digital payments. BACEN, LGPD, PIX-BACEN. API key. Brazil. Digital wallet and PIX payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Brazilian payments. BACEN, LGPD, PIX, PCI-DSS. API key. Brazil. Digital wallet and payment data.
